title: aeschynomene schliebenii var. mossambicensis
intro: Aeschynomene schliebenii var. mossambicensis, also known as the Mossambican sensitive plant, is a variety of flowering plant in the legume family Fabaceae. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial effects. The health benefits of Aeschynomene schliebenii var. mossambicensis include its use in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce stress and improve sleep. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in a decoction, and it is often used in traditional medicine in certain parts of Africa.
